_comment: REVIEW-ONLY manually seeded email-to-apply job (M15 first-email lane). The recipient uses the IANA-reserved, non-deliverable example.com domain so no real employer can ever be contacted, even accidentally. Replace with a real posting + real apply email only when Vadim provides one and explicitly approves a send.

jobs.title: Director, Marketing Operations
jobs.description: We are hiring a Director, Marketing Operations to own our marketing operations, revenue operations, and GTM systems. This role leads marketing technology and marketing automation strategy across the go-to-market organization, partnering closely on GTM strategy and lifecycle operations.
jobs.requirements: Deep command of marketing operations, revenue operations, and marketing technology. Track record building marketing systems and lifecycle operations that support go-to-market strategy. Comfortable owning the marketing automation roadmap.
jobs.responsibilities: Own the marketing operations and revenue systems function. Architect GTM systems and the martech stack. Drive marketing automation, lifecycle operations, and segmentation strategy in partnership with the leadership team.
